title: funcy's Floor Is Lava
description: The 2020 trend into Minecraft and play it with your friends!
body:
A simple minigame to play with your friends. When lava is rising and you and your friends try to surive as long as possible!

### Commands:
The main command of the plugin is ```/floorislava``` with:
- ```start``` To start the event
- ```reload``` To reload the plugin's config
- ```reset``` Start a new round
- ```donate``` A link to my Paypal!

<details>
<summary>config.yml</summary>

```
teleport-radius: 500
start-height: 0
border-size: 50 # In width (width * 2 for length)
lava-rise-speed: 100 # In ticks (amount of seconds you want * 20)
```
</details>

Feel free to [donate](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/funcybeardev)!

**YOU ARE REQUIRED TO RUN THIS PLUGIN ON A SEPERATE SERVER**
